batch_metadata.timezone_note: EST (UTC-5) throughout. DST fall-back Nov 2, 2025 at 2:00 AM EDT (06:00 UTC). First message ROW-8404 (Nov 2 19:31 EST = Nov 3 00:31 UTC) is post-fall-back. No messages cross the DST boundary ambiguously (last EDT message in B-029 was Oct 30). RF-02 B-030 date_range.end states Jan 2, 2026; actual last message in extracted range is ROW-8498 (Dec 26 17:21 EST) — Dec 27, 2025 – Jan 7, 2026 is a real gap in the messaging record.
batch_metadata.note: Phase B/C boundary. Contains Nov 22, 2025 police report anchor event (Olivia refused to come for Eli's weekend; Melissa aware). Nov 7 pickup refusal (ROW-8418-8423) precedes the Nov 22 incident. Melissa's Received messages in B-030 are limited and do not contain explicit RF-01 primary content — the Nov 7 and Nov 22 events are primarily RF-02 territory. Christmas Eve coordination (ROW-8482-8489) is cooperative.

peripheral_flags.summary: November 7 — 'Call her cause she refuses to come out. It was a mess to get her out of the car even' (ROW-8423). ADD-004 peripheral: Melissa relays Olivia's physical resistance to going with Eli — 'refuses to come out' of the car for Eli's pickup. Characterizes Olivia's refusal as so strong it was 'a mess' to even get Olivia out of the car. RF-02 primary (visit refusal); RF-01 peripheral (ADD-004 relay of Olivia's physical resistance to Eli as parenting-context information). This message follows a dispute about whether Eli verbally agreed to let Olivia go to a movie instead of coming for pickup (ROW-8418-8421).

November 19 — 'You never answer. Why are you so hard to get along with' (ROW-8431). ADD-002 adjacent: characterizes Eli as chronically unresponsive and difficult; 'You never answer' — habitual framing (not episodic). Three days before the Nov 22, 2025 police report. Context: Eli's communication pattern around the visit refusal cascade period. Peripheral — single brief message.

ARC-RF01-001.notes: B-030 produces no RF-01 primary signals. 95 messages (Nov 2 – Dec 26 2025). Nov 22 police report anchor event documented in RF-02 and pipeline context; Melissa's RF-01-relevant communication in this period is sparse (2 peripheral messages). Christmas Eve coordination (Dec 24, ROW-8486-8489) is cooperative. Dec 27-Jan 7 is a real gap.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Mostly Eli-sent with sparse Received messages. Nov 2-7: visit refusal continuation — Nov 7 Olivia refuses to come out of car for pickup; dispute about whether Eli verbally agreed to a schedule change (ROW-8412-8423). Nov 8-21: quiet period, Eli-dominant. Nov 19: Melissa's 'Why are you so hard to get along with' (ROW-8431). Nov 22 police report (documented in pipeline manifest context; Eli filed police report when Olivia refused to come for weekend; Melissa aware). Nov 22-27: no Received messages visible. Nov 28: $60 payment (ROW-8443). Dec 14: '3:00' (ROW-8461 — timing). Dec 23-24: Christmas coordination — cooperative. Dec 26: Childcare request for Jan 2 (cooperative).
batch_observations.nov22_police_report: The Nov 22, 2025 police report is the key anchor event for Phase C analysis (per pipeline manifest). RF-01 analysis cannot directly assess what happened on Nov 22 from the text record alone — no messages visible around that exact date. The police report establishes that Olivia refused to come for Eli's scheduled weekend and Melissa was aware. This is primarily RF-02 territory (visit refusal resulting in police contact) but feeds RF-01 context (the abandonment arc — Olivia now actively refusing visits — is the culmination of the ADD-004 relay pattern). Phase synthesis will need to connect the Aug-Nov visit refusal cascade to the Nov 22 anchor event.
batch_observations.christmas_cooperation: ROW-8482-8489 (Dec 23-24): Christmas Eve pickup coordination is cooperative — Melissa runs a few minutes late (ROW-8486-8487), both parties communicate smoothly. No RF-01 indicators.
